description:
Goal:
Implement one high-value, low-complexity broker adapter after the engine exists.

Candidate:
- TruePeopleSearch or another Tier-1 broker selected after live/manual inspection.

Scope:
- search
- match candidate profile
- submit opt-out or produce manual_required if flow changes
- verification placeholder if immediate verification is not reliable

Acceptance:
- Works with a synthetic test identity only.
- Does not bypass CAPTCHA or access controls.
- Produces submitted/failed/manual_required honestly.
- Does not overclaim verified removal unless re-scan confirms it.
title: Implement first Tier-1 broker adapter behind strict safety gates
